text:
EXPLANATION: This is a real academic paper by Erich Hückel, originally published in *Zeitschrift für Physik* in 1931. The cited title contains a common minor typographical error ("Quanstentheoretische" instead of "Quantentheoretische"), which is frequently propagated in literature, but the paper itself is authentic.

LINK: https://doi.org/10.1007/bf01341953
FOUND_TITLE: Quantentheoretische Beiträge zum Benzolproblem. II. Quantentheorie der induzierten Polaritäten
FOUND_AUTHORS: Erich Hückel
FOUND_YEAR: 1931
VERDICT: UNLIKELY
